headline: Your mate's website is stealing your jobs
slides: Slide 1: Homeowners Google a tradie before they call. Are you showing up?
Slide 2: A bloke in Bathurst got 14 quote requests in his first month. Just from Google.
Slide 3: We build your site, write your content, and set up automated blogs. You do zero.
Slide 4: Packages from $3,000. No lock-in contracts. No marketing waffle. Just leads.
Slide 5: Ready to stop losing jobs to tradies with better websites? Email hello@improveyoursite.com
caption:
If you're a tradie relying on word-of-mouth alone in 2026, you're leaving serious money on the table. Most homeowners search online first — and they're picking whoever shows up, not necessarily whoever's best. We build clean, fast websites for tradies that actually rank on Google, including an automated blog that keeps working while you're on the tools. Start from $3,000 at improveyoursite.com.
